note: One real Auto-Fix run on the folio-shop demo repo — real Playwright reproduction against the running store, real model-generated patch, real test output, real PR.

bugs.title: Applying the SAVE10 code crashes the cart
bugs.report: I clicked “Apply newsletter discount (SAVE10)” and nothing happened — the total stayed $50.00 and the page threw an error. The 10% never came off.

steps.label: Reproducing it against the running store
steps.sub: cloned the repo · npm ci · drove the live cart with Playwright from the captured report

lines: test('applying SAVE10 keeps the console clean', async ({ page }) => {

steps.label: Confirming the bug reproduces first
steps.sub: the generated test has to fail before any fix is allowed

run.fail: ✗ applying SAVE10 keeps the console clean

run.exp: Received: [ "…TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toFixed') at savingsLabel" ]

steps.label: Proposing the smallest fix
steps.sub: savingsLabel() read promo.amount, but the promo's discount field is named value

lines.add: const discount = promo.type === 'percent' ? sub * promo.value : promo.value;

steps.label: Re-running the reproduction + your existing test suite
steps.sub: the fix has to pass both before a PR is opened

run.pass: ✓ applying SAVE10 keeps the console clean

run.sum: reproduction green · 13/13 existing tests still pass
